element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mobility mechanic for evasion and traversal
Short-range burst mobility and damage option
Variant enemy archetype requiring different tactics
Mandatory progression gate at level conclusion
Narrative antagonist battles, culminates in final confrontation
Forced-pacing level variant requiring timing adaptation
Gameplay paradigm shift; single unique stage type
True final encounter on Normal and Hard difficulties

typical_relief_triggers: Safe platforming passages between combat zones
Rocket pack flight segments for evasion
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Combat-driven with punctuated boss gates; tension builds through enemy encounters and releases upon level/boss completion. Varied stage types (auto-scroll, top-down shooter) create pacing disruption and re-engagement rhythm.

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory tool mastery (sword, rocket pack, dash) with foundational enemy types (wolves, robots)
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased enemy density and complexity; introduction of level variant types (auto-scroll ostrich, top-down shooter); escalating boss difficulty
difficulty_curve.late_game: Culminates with Axel Gear confrontation; difficulty varies by selected mode (Easy ends with Axel; Normal continues to Lioness fight; Hard extends further)
notable_spikes: Level 3/2 (Easy) auto-scrolling ostrich: forced pacing eliminates player tempo control
Axel Gear encounters: rival boss with narrative weight
Final stage: Generalissimo Lioness battle (Normal+); true final difficulty gate

notable_level_patterns.description: Horizontal progression with enemy gauntlets, platforming passages, culminates in boss encounter. Uses sword energy bolts and rocket pack mobility.
Player rides robot-ostrich on auto-scrolling track; removes player movement control, emphasizes timing and reactive dodging over positioning.
Perspective shift to overhead view with shooting-focused mechanics; genre departure within campaign structure.
Campaign branch point: Easy ends with Axel Gear boss; Normal and Hard continue to battleship infiltration with Generalissimo Lioness true final battle.
